CURATED.CUSTOMER_PROFILE.description: One row per customer with slowly changing profile attributes used for analytics and ML feature generation.

CURATED.CUSTOMER_EVENTS.description: Customer event stream used to create recency, frequency, and intensity features.

CUSTOMER_ID.description: Foreign key to the customer profile table.

EVENT_TS.description: Event timestamp used for score-date filtering.

EVENT_TYPE.description: Event classification used for behavioral features.
